channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Ray Serve now slashes latency and blasts throughput. 88% P99 drop, 11.1x throughput for LLM inference with HAProxy + gRPC. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/ray-serv... https://Blockchain.News/news/ray-serve-upgrade-88-percent-lower-latency-ai-inference #AI #RayServe #Infra

item.title: AI agents go server-side for mobile apps — Copilot SDK lands, but RN apps must route through Node.js runtime. 🧠🔗 https://Blockchain.News/news/github-copilot-sdk-react-native-integration-tutorial #AI #GitHub #Copilot
item.description: AI agents go server-side for mobile apps — Copilot SDK lands, but RN apps must route through Node.js runtime. 🧠🔗 https://Blockchain.News/news/github-copilot-sdk-react-native-integration-tutorial #AI #GitHub #Copilot

item.title: Nemotron 3 drops: a 120B “Super” model with 5x thruput, multimodal safety, and 1M-token context. 🧠💥 Enterprise AI, unleashed. https://Blockchain.News/news/nvidia-nemotron-3-agent-stack-gtc-2026-enterprise-ai #AI #NVIDIA #EnterpriseAI
